needle_load.note: Claude uses 3s idle + 5s load = 8s; GPT-4o extends load to 17.5s.

third_throw.note: GPT-4o absorbs more late manipulation into third_throw.

suture_cut.note: Mirror of third_throw delta. Sum third_throw+cut: Claude 80s, GPT-4o 77.5s (delta 2.5s — near-exact).

gap_visible.note: Drain-gap agreement. V22 joins the agreement set.

long_tail_deduction_disagreement.claude_observation: Claude's 5.0 total penalties includes 3.0 placement + 2.0 other (possible tail/quality). GPT-4o's 2.5 is placement only.
long_tail_deduction_disagreement.analysis: Same rubric-scope issue seen on V20. GPT-4o's rubric-strict read is correct per the uploaded prompt.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Strong agreement. Both teachers independently score in the 440-443 range, both flag cutting as the dominant time sink, both confirm all rubric items. Midpoint 441.75 is the safest reconciled value. This is one of the tightest V-series agreements to date.

systematic_findings.phase_boundary_pattern_continues: V22 shows the classic late-phase boundary mirror: third_throw and cut have 21.5s and 24.0s individual deltas but their SUM is within 2.5s. Seventh consecutive video where this pattern holds (V11, V14, V16, V17, V18, V19, V22).
systematic_findings.drain_agreement_set_grows: V22 is the 5th drain-closure agreement (V12, V13, V18, V19, V22). Diverge: V11, V14, V16, V17, V20 (Claude flagged long tails, not gap). Pattern still inconsistent with recording-format hypothesis alone.
systematic_findings.recovery_confirmation: Both teachers read V22 as a clean, technically sound run. This corroborates Claude's trajectory narrative of a recovery from the V18-V20 fatigue valley. Reconciled 441.75 is a healthy mid-cluster score.
